title: Coverage cell — the frozen P1→P2 Stage-B metadata contract (P1 §7.1, P1-16)
description: Structured per-image coverage along the four LoRA axes. Mirrors orchestrator/coverage.py vocab (a test keeps them in lockstep). P2's template captioner consumes these fields. Any change here is a breaking change to P2 — bump coverage.CONTRACT_VERSION.
